headline: Is Cummins (CMI) Still Attractive After A 70.8% One Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Cummins at around US$554.75 is still a sensible entry point or more of a hold, you will want to see how its current price lines up with a fair value estimate. The stock has returned 2.1% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is a 6.5% decline and the 1 year return stands at 70.8%. This performance may have shifted how the market views both its growth potential and its risks. Recent headlines around Cummins have largely focused on its position as a key...
